items.title: 13 Surprising Companies Jeff Bezos Bet On
items.description: Bezos' venture capital firm has invested in biotech companies seeking to cure cancer, educational tech companies and more. Here's a look at some of his investments.

items.title: Better Buy: Rivian vs. Ford
items.description: In the world of cars today, there's always a debate between the old stalwarts and the new upstarts.

items.title: Amazon.com (AMZN) And Saks Unveil AI-Driven Customer Experiences Through AWS Collaboration
items.description: On August 8, 2025, NLX announced a collaboration with Saks Fifth Avenue and AWS, aimed at enhancing customer interactions through AI-powered experiences, which may have contributed to Amazon.com (AMZN)'s stock price increasing by 15% last quarter. This partnership, leveraging NLX Voice+ and Amazon Connect, aims to improve service efficiency and customer satisfaction, and represents a notable advancement in the company's offerings. items.title: How Much Richer Is Jeff Bezos Than the Entire Population of Florida?
items.description: Can one person's fortune truly rival the collective income and wealth of millions? Here's a look at how Jeff Bezos' net worth compares to the state of Florida.

items.title: How Much Richer Is Jeff Bezos Than the Entire Population of California?
items.description: Jeff Bezos is one billionaire who's so rich he could buy up your state.
